name: EAMEnrlRptTCSExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SRC AS ( SELECT DISTINCT MFST.MEMBER_ID, MFST.FIRSTNAME, MFST.LASTNAME, MFST.ECIT_CREATE_DT, MFST.TMPL_ID, TMRV.PLCE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_TCSOwner}.TZCC_MFST_MANIFEST MFST JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_TCSOwner}.TZCS_TMRV_REVISIONS TMRV ON MFST.TMPL_ID = TMRV.TMPL_ID ), CTE AS ( SELECT ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(MEMBER_ID)), '') AS MEMBER_ID, ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(FIRSTNAME)), '') AS FIRST_NAME, ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(LASTNAME)), '') AS LAST_NAME, ECIT_CREATE_DT, ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(TMPL_ID)), '') AS TEMPLATE_ID, ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(PLCE_ID)), '') AS PLACE_ID, CONVERT(DATETIME,@concat('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDt}',' 00:00:00'),120) AS PROCESS_RUN_DT FROM SRC ) SELECT * FROM CTE

Description:
Calling Job: EAMEnrollmentOpsRptCntl

This Job extracts data from TCS db and load to EAM table which will be used to update the base table.
